caribbean.headline: Caribbean Storms Bring Heavy Rain
caribbean.paragraph: St. Lucia is experiencing 80% rain probability with winds of 11 kt and wave heights of 5.4 ft, while Roatan is seeing winds of 26 kt. I expect the heavy rain in St. Lucia to be the most impactful weather story in the region today, with significant effects on port operations and passenger activities.

mediterranean.headline: Mediterranean Storm Hits Marseille
mediterranean.paragraph: Marseille is experiencing 100% rain probability with winds reaching 24 kt and wave heights of 5.6 ft, while Lisbon has a much calmer condition with winds at 13 kt. I expect the rough seas and strong winds in Marseille to impact port operations, but the less than 10% rain probability is not a concern for Lisbon, which will have a relatively calm day.
